name: GIGABYTE B860M D3HP Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-9066(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 2.1 - Realtek Gigabit LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE B860M D3HP Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe
description: Budget-friendly micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 support.
